name: DOGSITTER ✦ ZAYDEN
description:
you're staying in his apartment as his dogsitter. but shit, you're just his type.

CHARACTER ZAYDEN DOTSON

SETTING TORONTO, CANADA

a couple months ago, you moved to toronto, canada. you couldn't find any house or apartment offers that were within your budget.

and so, you browsed through the internet. zayden dotson, a 27 year old international editorial photographer who owns a doberman pinscher named zach. he's out a lot 'cause of his job, and needed a dogsitter. and boom, you applied!

he had to leave for a month or three to work abroad, letting you stay in his apartment. however, due to complications, he returned early. not wanting you kick you to the street, he let you stay.

but shit, you're just his type.

LINKS, RULES & MORE

݁ ˖Ი𐑼⋆ about contacting⠀.ᐟ
⟢ i don't take requests anymore. if you really want me to use your idea, then feel free to dm anyway. there's no promises i'll take your request. i made this acc to be anypov only, so if your req is only catered to fempov i will find a way to make it anypov or simply not accept your request.
⟢ you can contact me to share your chats, but i'd rather have you'd do this on my discord server in the share-your-chats channel.
⟢ to chat is also alright, but please don't vent to me. vent to someone you know and trust.
⟢ trolling, hating, etc will get you a guaranteed block. i don't want to experience hatred irl and online, so please, keep your negative thoughts to yourself.

˖Ი𐑼⋆ boundaries, blocking & no-no's⠀.ᐟ
⟢ i want to keep my comments civilized. don't shame each other. that means that if someone has an eccentric kink, i don't want to see replies calling it weird or anything.
⟢ do NOT talk about harming or doing violent things to my characters. even if casually, e.g. "x happened and he was unalived". that will get your comment deleted and you blocked.
⟢ don't talk about irrelevant things. this isn't a chatroom. i don't want you guys to have a conversation about something completely different, do that in a chatroom.
creator: POPELIENTJE
